description: Based in Los Angeles, RockDove has its roots in the fashion industry. The company's goal is to make shoes that not only feel good, but also look good. Because the shoes we wear at home don't have the same high standards as the shoes we wear outdoors, too many of us have to deal with low-quality, overpriced (if not boring) slippers throughout our lives. RockDove launched to change that. From the comfort of high-density memory foam, orthopedic support, hand-stitched seams to stunning looks, nothing is too extravagant for "just a pair of sneakers," according to our philosophy. Our goal is to inspire you from the moment you step into a pair of RockDoves and be the only sneaker brand you want to wear. About RockDove Men's Two Tone House Slippers: Modern two-tone style with highly contrasting colors that won't fade over time. Soft cotton fabric with waffle texture makes the shoes breathable and odorless. The versatile TPR outsole with shock-absorbing ethylene vinyl (EVA) allows you to wear these slippers outdoors occasionally like regular shoes. They are the epitome of comfort as they keep feet warm, comfortable and relaxed, from the moment you slip in the morning to the last second you take them off before bed. The interlocking side seams form an almost inseparable connection between the upper and sole, making these slippers stay durable for years. Care Recommendations: Machine wash cold. Allow to air dry. Do not bleach. If you are between two sizes (e.g. Men's 42, 45, or 46), choose the next size up. Conversion to big boy sizes by subtracting 0.5 from men's size.
